findings.evidence: Lines 106-108 define `IsCoveringMap.fundamentalGroupEquivFiber [SimplyConnectedSpace E] (hp : IsCoveringMap p)`, while lines 160-163 define `_hreg : IsRegular p` and return exactly `IsCoveringMap.fundamentalGroupEquivFiber hp e`; lines 168-179 similarly ignore `hreg`.
findings.fix: Remove the `IsRegular.fundamentalGroupEquivFiber` wrapper and its two simp lemmas, or expose only the general `IsCoveringMap.fundamentalGroupEquivFiber` API.
findings.issue: `IsRegular.fundamentalGroupEquivFiber` and its simp lemmas add a regularity hypothesis that is unused and suggest the fiber bijection needs deck regularity.

summary: The main deck-group equivalence is at the natural regular-cover level, but the regular-cover fiber API keeps an unused stronger hypothesis after the general theorem has been added.
